name: access
description: Non-human-identity governance CLI + MCP + serve: inventory of every agent/service identity, its credentials and MCP tool scopes, owner mapping, JIT elevation, access reviews and one-click revocation, plus the cohort MCP bearer-token issuer. Local mode uses SQLite at ~/.hasna/access/access.db; cloud mode (HASNA_ACCESS_STORAGE_MODE=cloud) is PURE REMOTE per Amendment A1 with all reads/writes hitting the shared cloud Postgres.
